summary:
The complex nature of ocular diseases requires specialized diagnostic skills and systemic knowledge. Improving training through structured education enhances accuracy in identification and treatment, leading to better patient outcomes in underserved regions such as West Africa.  

Note: This summary is based solely on Agent2’s provided content; no external information was used or inferred.
